core_principles: Mobile-first bottom navigation is strictly adhered to, using glassmorphism for depth.
Bento grid for dashboard data to maintain a rigid, technical, yet premium feel.
True obsidian black backgrounds (#0A0A0A) rather than standard greys to convey a premium 'pro' tool.
High contrast purely via black and white; semantic colors (green/red) reserved strictly for data meaning (profits vs incidents).

bottom_navigation.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border-t border-white/10 pb-safe
bottom_navigation.interaction: Active tab gets high contrast white icon/text, inactive gets muted gray.

kpi_card.style: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col justify-between

product_card.style: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative
product_card.vender_button: mt-auto w-full bg-white text-black py-3 font-semibold text-sm hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors

fab.style: fixed bottom-24 right-4 z-40 w-14 h-14 bg-white text-black rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)] hover:scale-105 transition-transform

list_item.style: flex items-center justify-between py-4 border-b border-white/10 last:border-0

incidencia_button.style: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-red-500/20

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, FAB) MUST have a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI exclusively using React.js and Tailwind CSS (no .tsx files).
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React for modern, crisp iconography.
The login screen should include both 'Google OAuth' and 'Email/Password' flows, along with a state for 'Join Group via Code'. Use glassmorphic panels for the auth forms.
Dashboard must contain 3 KPI cards (Total Revenue, Net Profit, Investment) and a Recharts/Shadcn bar chart with Day/Week/Month/Year filters.
For the bottom nav bar, use a fixed position at the bottom and ensure the body has sufficient bottom padding (pb-24) so content isn't obscured.
Ensure 'VENDIDO' button in the inventory grid is highly prominent (White background, black text).
Ensure the 'data-testid' attributes are strictly applied to tabs, forms, and buttons as per requirements.
In the sales view, profit margin must be distinctly styled in green (#10B981).
Ensure the application layout handles both Mobile (bottom nav) and Desktop (bottom nav can remain fixed or adapt, but mobile-first is the priority here).
